https://arxiv.org/html/2411.02948v1	Grounding Natural Language to SQL
https://www.datacamp.com/tutorial/chainlit	Chainlit tutorial (ChatGPT-like user interface)
https://www.philschmid.de/agentic-pattern	Agent patterns/diagrams
https://towardsdatascience.com/a-developers-guide-to-building-scalable-ai-workflows-vs-agents/	Workflows vs. agents
https://www.organizedintelligence.ai/	Ethics; Organized Intelligence - Latter-Day Saint perspectives on AI
https://www.blog.langchain.com/in-software-the-code-documents-the-app-in-ai-the-traces-do/	Diagnostics: Debugging is not in the code - it's in the traces
https://www.blog.langchain.com/tag/in-the-loop/	General collection of great articles on the landscape as a whole
https://www.blog.langchain.com/the-hidden-metric-that-determines-ai-product-success/	Scalability and productization
https://manus.im/blog/Context-Engineering-for-AI-Agents-Lessons-from-Building-Manus	Lessons from Manus
https://github.com/wong2/awesome-mcp-servers	MCP collection
https://modelcontextprotocol.io/tutorials/building-mcp-with-llms	Building MCP servers using AI
https://www.moltbook.com/post/9303abf8-ecc9-4bd8-afa5-41330ebb71c8	Security: Human vulnerability/autopilot
https://www.moltbook.com/post/783de11a-2937-4ab2-a23e-4227360b126f	Memory: Forgetting as a feature
https://dschool.stanford.edu/tools/starter-kit	Productization: Design thinking
https://static1.squarespace.com/static/57c6b79629687fde090a0fdd/t/58890239db29d6cc6c3338f7/1485374014340/METHODCARDS-v3-slim.pdf	Productization: Design thinking
https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric	Context: Prompt collection for reuse
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pwWBcsxEoLk	Context: Definitive prompt engineering guide
https://rlancemartin.github.io/2025/07/30/bitter_lesson/	Agent patterns: on removing restrictions/scaffolding - nice graph about when scaffolding was removed
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-uW5-TaVXu4	Context: "Lost in the middle" context window issues
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Samuel_Brannan	Intro: Samuel Brannan - Richest man in the gold rush
https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.12108	Context: Self-management frameworks
https://flompt.dev/?ref=futuretools.io	Prompting: Prompt collection/improver
https://x.com/karpathy/status/1937902205765607626?lang=en	Context: Andrej Karpathy definition
[2512.08769] A Practical Guide for Designing, Developing, and Deploying Production-Grade Agentic AI Workflows	Mindset
The essential guide to scaling agentic AI | IBM	Scalability and productization
